title: A partridge & a pear tree
description: This mod is simple, it adds a partridge and a pear tree with pears that you can eat.
body:
This mod is simple, it adds a bird called partridge and a pear tree with pears that you can eat. This was inspired by the christmas song; "The Twelve Days Of Christmas". This mod is just for fun and is very simple. The pear tree spawn naturally in the world and has pears hanging from it. You can break the pears and craft them into pear slices, which are a food source. (The trees currently only spawn in the ocean for some reason, if somebody can tell me how to fix this in the comments, it would be greatly appreciated.)

The partridges spawn naturally in every biome, and drop raw chicken if killed (though who would want to kill an innocent partridge partridge!?) The partridges also make realistic 
sounds.

(Made Using Mcreator and Blockbench)
